text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I come to the school for an interview<n>with the
school's newspaper. After<n>we finish up...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice Mejiro Dober staring straight<n>in my
direction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
How can they stay so calm with all<n>those
cameras? I wish I could be like<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-nothing. I didn't say anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! U-um, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's my problem, so it's none of your<n>concern.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober remains tight-lipped,<n>but I distinctly
recall hearing her<n>mumble "I wish I could be like
that."
choice_data_list:
Are you uncomfortable with having your photo
taken?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? How did you...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seems I hit the nail on the head.<n>Wanting to help
her out, I give her<n>some advice on how to be
more at<n>ease with having her photo taken.
choice_data_list: Train your body to gain confidence!
Practice smiling in front of a mirror!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do... do you think you could teach me<n>some tips
on how to look good in<n>pictures?
choice_data_list: Are you bad with having your photo taken?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't like being the center of<n>attention... I have a
lot of trouble<n>smiling naturally for interviews and<n>
such.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I really do want to be able to<n>smile boldly in
front of the camera.
choice_data_list: Train your body to gain confidence!
Practice smiling in front of a mirror!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't ask for your advice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Confidence...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Is that really all it takes? I<n>wonder if
that'll help me smile more<n>naturally.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I'll give it a shot. I'll use what<n>you've said
when I train too. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And with that, Mejiro Dober walks<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll really be able to smile<n>naturally if
I'm more confident in<n>myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I suppose I could try it out if I feel<n>like it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A mirror? You can't be serious...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Smile in front of a mirror? But that<n>sounds so
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll... keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But it sounds easy enough to do, and<n>it'll be
good to see what I look like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your advice. I'll try it<n>and see how
it goes.
